title: Barley Pilaf in Chinese Style
description: A flavorful, savory barley pilaf with a Chinese twist, incorporating tangy and Ukrainian-inspired flavors.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice the onion for better flavor

instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the barley, soy sauce, tangy sauce, and pilaf spice blend. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the barley is tender.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
